problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
hypothesis: If Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response is applied to microcracks, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
